chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.D-757 of 2021 ______________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge(s) Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc. No.3101/2021. 2. For order on office objection no.18&27. 3. For order on Misc. No.3102/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 02.02.2021 Petitioner present in person. ------ 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Petitioner has filed this petition for a claim of post-retirement benefits. He was appointed somewhere in 1988 as an ad-hoc employee and was regularized in 1994. He claimed to have proceeded to Saudi Arabia during his service and on inquiry, he categorically stated that he sought permission from the department in that regard which was “granted” and only then he left the country. He then relied upon certain show-cause notices and their replies however when the petitioner was asked to show permission to leave the country while he was in service, as has been categorically stated by him, he submits that permission was not granted but he had just applied for it. He is not in a position as to what had happened to those show-cause notices of which reply was filed by him on 11.06.2002. To appreciate and ascertain whether the petitioner has a requisite length of service to claim pensionary benefits; and/or his service was dispensed with under the disciplinary proceedings by the respondent- department or otherwise, let notice be issued to the respondents as well as to learned AAG with direction to file comments before the next date of hearing. To come up in the third week of this month.
